title: geum ochroleucum
intro: Geum ochroleucum, also known as the mountain avens, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). This perennial plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Geum ochroleucum include its ability to treat digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Geum ochroleucum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and valuable plant in traditional herbal medicine.
